notes: pcidrv KMDF adapter initialization. NICAllocRfdWorkItem is EVT_WDF_WORKITEM (PASSIVE_LEVEL), but scanner spinlock heuristic misfires and labels it 'dispatch'. NICFreeRfdWorkItem is also EVT_WDF_WORKITEM but has no spinlock in body — scanner correctly labels it 'other'. Reveals that the spinlock heuristic can override the correct WDF callback type when a workitem body happens to acquire a lock.

NICAllocRfdWorkItem.label: other
NICAllocRfdWorkItem.notes: EVT_WDF_WORKITEM — declared in nic_def.h. Runs at PASSIVE_LEVEL. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' because body calls WdfSpinLockAcquire — spinlock heuristic false positive over a PASSIVE_LEVEL workitem.

NICFreeRfdWorkItem.label: other
NICFreeRfdWorkItem.notes: EVT_WDF_WORKITEM — declared in nic_def.h. Runs at PASSIVE_LEVEL. Scanner correctly labels 'other' (no spinlock in body).

LocalMmMapIoSpace.label: other
LocalMmMapIoSpace.notes: Internal wrapper for MmMapIoSpace. Not a registered callback.

NICAllocateSoftwareResources.label: other
NICAllocateSoftwareResources.notes: PASSIVE_LEVEL init helper. Not a registered callback.

NICFreeSoftwareResources.label: other
NICFreeSoftwareResources.notes: PASSIVE_LEVEL cleanup helper. Not a registered callback.

NICMapHWResources.label: other
NICMapHWResources.notes: Maps hardware resources during device add. PASSIVE_LEVEL. Not a registered callback.

NICUnmapHWResources.label: other
NICUnmapHWResources.notes: Unmaps hardware resources. PASSIVE_LEVEL. Not a registered callback.

NICGetDeviceInformation.label: other
NICGetDeviceInformation.notes: Reads PCI device info. PASSIVE_LEVEL helper.

NICReadAdapterInfo.label: other
NICReadAdapterInfo.notes: Reads adapter EEPROM/registry info. PASSIVE_LEVEL helper.

NICAllocAdapterMemory.label: other
NICAllocAdapterMemory.notes: Allocates DMA and descriptor memory. PASSIVE_LEVEL helper.

NICInitSendBuffers.label: other
NICInitSendBuffers.notes: Init helper for send buffer ring. PASSIVE_LEVEL.

NICInitRecvBuffers.label: other
NICInitRecvBuffers.notes: Init helper for receive buffer ring. PASSIVE_LEVEL.

NICAllocRfd.label: other
NICAllocRfd.notes: Allocates a single RFD descriptor. Internal helper.

NICFreeRfd.label: other
NICFreeRfd.notes: Frees a single RFD descriptor. Internal helper.

NICShutdown.label: other
NICShutdown.notes: Adapter shutdown sequence. Called from power-down path.

HwSoftwareReset.label: other
HwSoftwareReset.notes: Issues hardware software reset command. Internal helper.

HwConfigure.label: other
HwConfigure.notes: Configures NIC hardware registers. Internal helper.

HwSetupIAAddress.label: other
HwSetupIAAddress.notes: Sets up individual address filter. Internal helper.

HwClearAllCounters.label: other
HwClearAllCounters.notes: Clears hardware statistics counters. Internal helper.

NICGetDeviceInfSettings.label: other
NICGetDeviceInfSettings.notes: Reads INF settings from registry. PASSIVE_LEVEL.
